backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Product, Material, and Order types with hardcoded sample data, exposing query functions for products, orders, and order status via a map-based store.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (luxury theme, scroll animations, zoom/lightbox, homepage sections, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each component, hook, and page.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (home, catalog, product detail, about, track), wraps them in a shared Layout with Header/Footer/CartSidebar, and provides a CartContext.
frontend/src/components/CartSidebar.tsx: Slide-in right-side cart drawer displaying cart items with image, material, engraving text, and price, plus a subtotal row, payment icons, and a checkout button.
frontend/src/components/CustomizationRul: Dialog modal informing users of the 24-hour production/no-return policy with 'I Agree & Continue' and 'Cancel' action buttons.
frontend/src/components/EngravingPreview: Renders an interactive 3D pendant preview using React Three Fiber with a rotating gold disc, engraved text overlay, and a text input for customizing the engraving message (max 30 chars).
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with logo, navigation links, support links, payment icons, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, a cart icon with item count badge, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorks.tsx: Three-step process section (Upload, Etch, Deliver) with scroll-reveal animations and icon cards laid out in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/ImageLightbox.ts: Full-screen image lightbox overlay with backdrop blur, close button, and body scroll lock while open.
frontend/src/components/MaterialHub.tsx: Material selector component that renders color-coded toggle buttons for each available material and displays the selected material's price.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusTrack: Visual order progress tracker showing Designing, Etching, and Shipped stages with an animated connecting line and checkmarks for completed steps.
frontend/src/components/PaymentIcons.tsx: Displays a row of styled text badges for accepted payment methods (Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, etc.) with grayscale hover effect.
frontend/src/components/PhotoLab.tsx: Photo upload UI that shows a circular preview thumbnail when a photo is loaded or a dashed upload button that opens a PhotoUploadModal.
frontend/src/components/PhotoUploadModal: A modal dialog that allows users to upload a photo for laser-etching, showing a circular preview with a face-centering overlay before confirming.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with hover image swap, a zoomable lightbox on image click, and navigation to the product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProductImageGall: A product image gallery that shows a zoomable main image and thumbnail strip, switching images based on selected material or product ID.
frontend/src/components/StickyAddToBagBa: A fixed bottom bar showing product name, material, price, and an 'Add to Bag' button that triggers a customization rules confirmation modal before adding.
frontend/src/components/TrendingCollecti: A homepage section that fetches and displays up to four products in a responsive grid with scroll-reveal animations and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/VideoHero.tsx: A full-screen hero section with a looping video (falling back to a poster image), animated headline text, and a CTA button navigating to the catalog.
frontend/src/components/ZoomableImage.ts: A wrapper component that adds CSS zoom-on-hover behavior and opens a lightbox when the image is clicked.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: A React hook managing local cart state with add, remove, and clear operations, automatically incrementing quantity for duplicate items and tracking the cart drawer open state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useLightbox.ts: Custom hook that manages lightbox open/close state and image source, with Escape key support for closing.
frontend/src/hooks/useParallax.ts: Custom hook that tracks window scroll position and returns a CSS translateY transform string for parallax effects at a configurable speed.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching products, a single product by ID, order status, and all orders from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.ts: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to set a visibility flag when an element scrolls into view, enabling scroll-triggered reveal animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining the ETCHLY luxury color palette as CSS variables for light/dark modes, and utility classes for animations and zoom effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ArtisanStoryPage.tsx: Page component presenting ETCHLY's artisan craftsmanship story with a parallax hero image, scroll-reveal content sections, and pull quotes.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Product catalog page that fetches and displays all products in a responsive grid with scroll-reveal animations and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component that composes the VideoHero, HowItWorks, and TrendingCollections sections.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConciergePage.ts: Order tracking page where users can submit an order ID to query its status, displaying results via OrderStatusTracker or an error message.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: React page component for displaying a single product's detail view, including an image gallery, material selector, photo lab, engraving preview, and a sticky add-to-bag bar with scroll-reveal animation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the project's custom color palette (gold, etchly brand colors), typography (Cormorant Garamond, Montserrat), shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations for the luxury jewelry storefront.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for ETCHLY, a luxury laser-etched jewelry e-commerce platform, documenting architecture, required image assets, implemented features, and known issues at schema version 1.0.0.
